facts.token_header_note: The HTTP header name is literally 'token' (not 'Authorization'). The header value is the raw JWT string (no 'Bearer ' prefix). Source: app/core/dependency.py line 13 — `token: str = Header(..., description='token验证')`. The string 'dev' is accepted as a bypass token in development mode (app/core/dependency.py line 15).
